series_metadata.series_description: Files containing records that are completed or provided by a medical/mental health consultant or consultant group. Files may contain contact information; licensures; forms that initiate business interactions; production data; work quality review; site visit information (for external consultants); sanction and complaint issues.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: Contact and licensure records are updated regularly and file contains only most current records. Files are maintained seven (7) federal fiscal years following last date of service agency. A Certificate of Disposal is required when destroying these records. ; Electronic: Contact and licensure records are updated regularly and file contains only most current records. Files are maintained seven (7) federal fiscal years following last date of service agency. A Certificate of Disposal is required when destroying these records
